_comment: EXAMPLE PACK detectors — one worked example per template the engine ships. Every detector MUST carry innocent_explanations written BEFORE you look at its output; tolerances encode known lawful causes of the pattern.

detectors._comment: same fact reported differently by two sources, beyond a tolerance
innocent_explanations: The audit copy may round to whole hundreds — differences at/under $100 are excluded by tolerance
One copy may be a later amendment

detectors._comment: expected counterpart record missing — often the legal-flag detector

params.expectation: a vendor-registry entry (grants above $50k require a registered vendor)

innocent_explanations: Registry snapshot may predate the award (censoring at the dump date)
The vendor may be registered under a parent company's ref code
Big institutions lawfully receive big grants; volume alone is not a story

detectors._comment: entity-name strings that embed a hidden principal
innocent_explanations: Fiscal sponsorship is legal and common for small nonprofits; the story is only in obscured ultimate beneficiaries
